response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Strong background in software development with diverse technologies
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices
Proven ability to scale and lead engineering teams
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
No clear evidence of experience with foundation models and LLM infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
